hero.title: AI Engineer
hero.subtitle: Building intelligent systems that bridge research and real world impact.

about.title: About Me
about.body: Artificial Intelligence Engineering Student at ITS focused on Applied Deep Learning. Gold Medalist at Gemastik XVIII and 1st Place Winner at BRIN AIDeaNation. Specialization in Audio and Image Processing, ranging from deploying bio acoustic models for healthcare to researching synthetic data with Stable Diffusion. Passionate about solving high stakes problems through AI engineering.
about.degree: Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence Engineering

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Open to research collaborations, AI projects, and freelance engagements.
